relocation.package_summary: OpenAI offers relocation assistance for Bay Area roles, typically including broker-managed moving services, temporary housing for 1-3 months, flights, and a sign-on relocation bonus; lease-break fees may be covered up to a cap.
relocation.policy_notes: Relocation bonus often vests over 1 year with clawback if departure within 12 months; tax-grossed-up in some cases. Source: Glassdoor reviews and Levels.fyi data.

benefits.401k_match: OpenAI provides a 401(k) with a safe harbor match, contributing 100% of employee contributions up to 4% of total annual compensation.
benefits.healthcare: OpenAI offers comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance for employees and their families. While described as comprehensive, some feedback suggests family coverage can be moderate in depth.
benefits.dental_vision: Comprehensive coverage through Delta Dental and VSP; employer covers 100% employee, 50% dependents
benefits.estimated_copay: $200-400 monthly for family coverage at $200k+ base
benefits.meals_provided: Daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner are provided for employees in the office.
benefits.mental_health: Mental healthcare support and services are available, including 6 coaching sessions for employees and their dependents.
benefits.other_perks: Other perks include a conference budget, extended parental leave (20-24 weeks), fertility and family planning coverage, an annual learning and development stipend, flexible work hours, and employee resource groups.

sentiment.blind_score: 4.1/5 + Recent threads highlight intense pace but strong mission alignment and equity upside
sentiment.glassdoor_score: 4.3 stars + Recurring themes: innovative culture, high workload, excellent comp and remote flexibility
sentiment.reddit_pulse: r/MachineLearning and r/cscareerquestions: Positive on AI impact but burnout concerns; e.g., 'OpenAI hiring spree but expect 60+ hr weeks' (Apr 2026 thread), 'Great for comms roles if you thrive in chaos' (Mar 2026)
sentiment.x_pulse: Sam Altman tweets emphasize collaborative culture and low attrition; recent posts on hiring for research teams highlight 'world-class talent' without toxicity mentions

likely_recruiter.name: unknown
likely_recruiter.rationale: Search LinkedIn for recruiters at OpenAI who specialize in 'Communications' or 'Research' roles.

likely_hiring_manager.name: unknown
likely_hiring_manager.rationale: The role reports to the 'Research Communications Lead'. As of late 2025, Lindsey Held is the interim VP of Communications. Search LinkedIn for the 'Research Communications Lead' at OpenAI.
